name: Porridge with berries & seeds
methodText: 50g oats with 250ml semi-skimmed milk or water; top with 80g mixed berries and 1 tbsp mixed seeds.

name: Greek yoghurt, nuts & berries
methodText: 200g full-fat Greek yoghurt, 20g almonds/walnuts, 80g berries.

name: Eggs & avocado on wholegrain toast
methodText: 2 eggs (poached/scrambled), ½ avocado, 1 slice wholegrain toast.

name: Overnight oats with apple & cinnamon
methodText: 50g oats, 150g yoghurt, grated apple, cinnamon; fridge overnight.

name: Mushroom & spinach omelette
methodText: 3 eggs, 80g mushrooms, handful spinach, 1 tsp olive oil.

name: Smoked salmon & cream cheese bagel thin
methodText: 1 bagel thin, 50g smoked salmon, 30g light cream cheese, squeeze of lemon.

name: Lentil & vegetable soup (batch)
methodText: Red lentils, carrot, celery, onion, tinned tomatoes, stock; simmer 30 min. Freezes well.

name: Chicken & quinoa salad bowl
methodText: 120g cooked chicken, 80g cooked quinoa, mixed leaves, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, olive oil & lemon dressing.

name: Tuna, bean & red onion salad
methodText: 1 tin tuna, ½ tin cannellini beans, red onion, parsley, olive oil, vinegar.

name: Wholemeal chicken & salad wrap
methodText: Wholemeal wrap, 100g chicken, salad, 1 tbsp hummus.

name: Mediterranean chickpea bowl
methodText: Chickpeas, roasted peppers & courgette, olives, feta, olive oil, herbs.

name: Jacket potato, tuna & sweetcorn
flavourText: Classic Earth fare. Reliable thruster fuel.
methodText: Medium jacket potato, 1 tin tuna, sweetcorn, light mayo.

name: Egg & spinach shakshuka
methodText: Tomato & pepper base, 2 eggs poached in sauce, spinach stirred through.

name: Salmon, new potatoes & greens
methodText: 130g baked salmon, 200g new potatoes, steamed broccoli & green beans.

name: Chicken & vegetable stir-fry with noodles
methodText: 120g chicken, mixed stir-fry veg, 1 nest wholewheat noodles, soy & ginger.

name: Chilli con carne with brown rice (batch)
flavourText: Batch-replicated. Four portions enter the freezer; morale rises.
methodText: 5% lean mince, kidney beans, tomatoes, spices; serve with 60g (dry) brown rice.

name: Veggie bean chilli with rice (batch)
flavourText: Meat-free stardate. The reactor won't notice.
methodText: Mixed beans, lentils, tomatoes, peppers, spices; brown rice.

name: Baked cod, lentils & roasted veg
methodText: 150g cod, 150g cooked puy lentils, roasted peppers/courgette/red onion.

name: Turkey meatballs, courgetti & wholewheat spaghetti
methodText: Turkey mince meatballs, tomato sauce, half spaghetti half courgetti.

name: Chicken traybake with Mediterranean veg
flavourText: One tray. Minimal cleanup. Engineering approves.
methodText: Chicken thighs, peppers, courgette, red onion, olives, olive oil; roast 35 min.

name: Prawn & vegetable curry with rice
methodText: Prawns, light coconut milk, curry paste, spinach & peppers; 60g (dry) basmati.

name: Tofu & broccoli stir-fry with rice
methodText: 200g tofu, broccoli, garlic, ginger, soy; 60g (dry) brown rice.

name: Apple with peanut butter
methodText: 1 apple, 20g peanut butter.

name: Handful of almonds
methodText: 30g almonds.

name: Carrot & pepper sticks with hummus
methodText: Veg sticks, 50g hummus.

name: Cottage cheese & oatcakes
methodText: 100g cottage cheese, 2 oatcakes.

name: Boiled eggs (2)
methodText: 2 boiled eggs, pinch of salt & pepper.

name: Greek yoghurt with honey drizzle
methodText: 150g Greek yoghurt, 1 tsp honey.

name: Dark chocolate squares (2) & walnuts
methodText: 2 squares 70%+ dark chocolate, 15g walnuts.

name: Pear & 20g cheddar
methodText: 1 pear, 20g cheddar.
